payload.title: work:Place Level Bars
payload.text: Place 5 double-sided level bars (A/B side). [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/level-bar-criteria-a-side]

payload.title: work:Stack Tiles on Bars
payload.text: Stack tiles on bar slots. Tiles per stack = num_players - 1. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/game-setup/10-children/tile-stacks]

payload.title: work:Place Pharaoh on Queen
payload.text: Place Pharaoh token on Queen tile (level 7). [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/level-7-tiles/10-children/queen-yellow-level-7]

payload.title: work:Distribute Starting Gear
payload.text: Each player: 1 pyramid, 3 standard dice, 1 reroll token. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/game-setup/10-children/player-setup]

payload.title: work:Determine Start Player
payload.text: Youngest player gets Start Player tile, goes first. Clockwise order.

payload.title: work:Cycle Through Players
payload.text: Each player takes a turn in clockwise order from start player. Repeat rounds.

payload.title: work:Check Queen Claimed
payload.text: After Queen claim, finish current round then enter Final Roll-Off. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/final-roll-off]

payload.title: work:Set Current Player
payload.text: GameState.currentPlayer = next player. Code: GameState.StartTurn().

payload.title: work:Execute Turn Phases
payload.text: StartOfTurn -> RollLoop -> ClaimPhase -> PostClaim -> EndOfTurn. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/player-turn-structure]

payload.title: work:Handle Extra Turn
payload.text: Omen/Good Omen/Queen's Favor -> player takes another turn. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/tile-power-categories/10-children/extra-turn-powers]

payload.title: work:Add Bonus Dice to Cup
payload.text: Add dice from owned tiles. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/tile-power-categories/10-children/roll-extra-dice-powers]

payload.title: work:Fire StartOfTurn Triggers
payload.text: TileAbility.Trigger.StartOfTurn. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/player-turn-structure/10-children/start-of-turn]

payload.title: work:Reset Per-Turn State
payload.text: Clear isUsedThisTurn on all abilities. Reset diceLockedThisTurn = 0. Remove old temp dice.

payload.title: work:Roll All Dice in Cup
payload.text: Physics roll all active dice. Code: DiceCup.OnMouseDown() -> PharoahDie.RollDie().

payload.title: work:Enter Lock Phase
payload.text: Must lock >= 1 die before other actions. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/player-turn-structure/10-children/lock-phase]

payload.title: work:Optional Scarab Phase
payload.text: Spend tokens on active dice. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/scarab-token-system]

payload.title: work:Continue or Stop
payload.text: Roll again or proceed to claim. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/player-turn-structure/10-children/continue-or-stop-decision]

payload.title: work:Roll Dice Physics
payload.text: PharoahDie.RollDiePhysics(). Wall colliders contain dice. Wait for Rigidbody.IsSleeping().

payload.title: work:Read Die Values
payload.text: Read face-up values. Custom dice trigger abilities. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/custom-dice-special-face-abilities]

payload.title: work:Fire AfterRoll Triggers
payload.text: Estate Overseer/Granary Master increment stored die. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/tile-power-categories/10-children/stored-die-powers-increment-per-roll]

payload.title: work:Track Roll Number
payload.text: Some abilities are first-roll-only: Farmer, Worker, Soldier, Soothsayer, Artisan (1st roll pip).

payload.title: work:Player Selects Die to Lock
payload.text: Click active die -> PharoahDie.MoveToLockedArea(). Must lock >= 1 per roll.

payload.title: work:Auto-Lock Immediate Dice
payload.text: White dice must lock immediately. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/dice-types-and-faces/10-children/immediate-die-white]

payload.title: work:Fire LockedAny Triggers
payload.text: Herder: locked pair -> +1 die. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/player-turn-structure/10-children/lock-phase]

payload.title: work:Validate Lock Legality
payload.text: Cannot unlock previously-locked die. Cannot roll without locking new die.

payload.title: work:Spend Reroll Token
payload.text: Reroll 1 active die. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/scarab-token-system/10-children/reroll-token]

payload.title: work:Spend Pip Token
payload.text: Add +1 pip, max die value. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/scarab-token-system/10-children/1-pip-token]

payload.title: work:Spend Die Token
payload.text: Add 1 temp standard die, roll immediately. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/scarab-token-system/10-children/1-die-token]

payload.title: work:Activate Tile Powers
payload.text: Use active tile abilities: adjust, reroll, lock. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/tile-power-categories/10-children/adjust-die-powers]

payload.title: work:Roll Again
payload.text: Active dice in cup -> return to Roll Phase. PlayerGameState.mayRollDice = true.

payload.title: work:All Locked - Must Stop
payload.text: No active dice -> proceed to Claim. Fire AllLocked triggers. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/player-turn-structure/10-children/continue-or-stop-decision]

payload.title: work:Fire AllLocked Triggers
payload.text: Priest of the Dead, Spirit of the Dead, Burial Mask: +1 die at any value. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/tile-power-categories/10-children/reroll-powers]

payload.title: work:Player Stops Early
payload.text: Voluntary stop with active dice remaining. DiceCup right-click or End Turn.

payload.title: work:Evaluate Criteria
payload.text: Check locked dice vs level bars. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/tile-claiming-rules/10-children/criteria-matching]

payload.title: work:Display Claimable Tiles
payload.text: Highlight valid tiles. Gray out unavailable. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/tile-claiming-rules/10-children/claiming-restrictions]

payload.title: work:Claim One Tile
payload.text: PlayerBoard.ClaimTile() -> Instantiate(tile) -> add to tileList.

payload.title: work:Pass - Gain 2 Tokens
payload.text: No claim -> 2 scarab tokens. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/scarab-token-system/10-children/gaining-tokens]

payload.title: work:Fire Acquire Triggers
payload.text: TileAbility.Trigger.Acquire. Some artifacts trigger immediately on acquire.

payload.title: work:Extra Turn - Omen
payload.text: Take another turn, -1 standard die. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/level-3-tiles/10-children/omen-red-level-3]

payload.title: work:Extra Turn - Good Omen
payload.text: Take another turn, normal dice. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/level-4-tiles/10-children/good-omen-red-level-4]

payload.title: work:Extra Turn - Queen's Favor
payload.text: Claim tile + extra turn. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/level-7-tiles/10-children/queen-s-favor-red-level-7]

payload.title: work:Extra Claims - Secret Passage
payload.text: Claim up to 2 level 3 tiles. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/level-6-tiles/10-children/secret-passage-red-level-6]

payload.title: work:Extra Claims - Treasure
payload.text: Split dice, claim 2 tiles. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/level-6-tiles/10-children/treasure-red-level-6]

payload.title: work:Extra Claims - Royal Power
payload.text: Claim up to 2 blue tiles. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/level-7-tiles/10-children/royal-power-red-level-7]

payload.title: work:Queen Claim - Trigger Roll-Off
payload.text: Take Pharaoh, announce score, trigger roll-off. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/final-roll-off/10-children/roll-off-trigger]

payload.title: work:Return Dice to Cup
payload.text: PharoahDie.ReadyToRoll() for each die. Move to InCupArea.

payload.title: work:Remove Temporary Dice
payload.text: Destroy temp dice (bIsTemporary flag). From +1 Die tokens, Charioteer, etc.

payload.title: work:Reset Ability Flags
payload.text: Clear isUsedThisTurn, isUsedThisRoll. Reset per-roll artifact states.

payload.title: work:Fire EndOfTurn Triggers
payload.text: TileAbility.Trigger.EndOfTurn. Bad Omen affects other players here.

payload.title: work:Advance to Next Player
payload.text: Next player clockwise. If round complete + Queen claimed -> Final Roll-Off.

payload.title: work:Pharaoh Token Transfer
payload.text: Queen claimer takes token, announces score. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/final-roll-off/10-children/roll-off-trigger]

payload.title: work:Complete Current Round
payload.text: Remaining players get normal turns. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/final-roll-off/10-children/round-completion]

payload.title: work:Compensate Skipped Players
payload.text: Players who missed a turn get +1 die token. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/final-roll-off/10-children/roll-off-trigger]

payload.title: work:Roll-Off Turns
payload.text: Each player gets 1 final turn. Beat Pharaoh score to claim token. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/final-roll-off/10-children/roll-off-turns]

payload.title: work:Queen's Last Chance
payload.text: Queen claimer's final attempt if Pharaoh was taken. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/final-roll-off/10-children/queen-s-last-chance]

payload.title: work:Determine Winner
payload.text: Pharaoh holder wins. Tie-break: right of Queen claimer. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/final-roll-off/10-children/determining-the-winner]

payload.title: work:Display Winner
payload.text: Show winning player, final score, tiles collected. NOT IMPLEMENTED.

payload.title: work:Game Over Options
payload.text: Rematch, menu, etc. NOT IMPLEMENTED.
